Operation 'placesSearch' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary 'Place Search' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity on return value structure and what Place objects contain. Added specific details about supported query types, location options, default behavior, and return value (Place objects with specific attributes) to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand what data they'll receive.

data.current_description:
Search for places in the FSQ Places database using a location and querying by name, category name, telephone number, taste label, or chain name. For example, search for "coffee" to get back a list of recommended coffee shops.
You may pass a location with your request by using one of the following options. If none of the following options are passed, Place Search defaults to geolocation using ip biasing with the optional radius parameter.
ll & radius (circular boundary)
near (geocodable locality)
ne & sw (rectangular boundary)
data.summary_suggestion: Search places by location and query criteria
data.description_suggestion: Searches the Foursquare Places database for venues matching specified query criteria and location parameters. Supports multiple query types including place name, category, telephone number, taste label, or chain name. Location can be specified via circular boundary (ll & radius), geocodable locality (near), or rectangular boundary (ne & sw). If no location is provided, defaults to IP-based geolocation with optional radius. Returns a list of matching Place objects with details including location, categories, hours, photos, and other venue information.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Place Search' is too generic and not action-oriented. Description lacks clarity on return value structure and what Place objects contain. Added specific details about supported query types, location options, default behavior, and return value (Place objects with specific attributes) to improve AI agent interpretability and help agents understand what data they'll receive.
